home.hero_tag: 🌱 Fresh from farmers to your door
home.hero_desc: Skip the middlemen. Buy fresh, healthy, and affordable vegetables and fruits directly from Rajshahi farmers.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Experiences of those who used our service
home.testi_1_desc: I am very satisfied buying vegetables from Shakdal. Prices are lower than the market and quality is top-notch.
home.testi_2_desc: Getting products straight from the farmer leaves no doubt about its freshness.
home.testi_3_desc: As a farmer, I am finally getting the fair price for my crops. Thanks to Shakdal.
